title: senecio aspericaulis
intro: Senecio aspericaulis, also known as the Cape broom plant, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Senecio aspericaulis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and soothe digestive issues. Senecio aspericaulis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
